steps.title: Simplify the given line
steps.content: Start with $4(x-n)=12y+24n$. Expanding gives $4x-4n=12y+24n$, so $4x-12y=28n$. Divide by $4$ to get $$x-3y=7n.$$

steps.title: Use the no-solution condition
steps.content: A system of two linear equations has no solution when the lines are parallel and distinct. The second equation must have the same $x-3y$ left side but a different constant from $7n$.

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content: A choice with the same line, so it would give infinitely many solutions. The other choices use $x+3y$, so they are not parallel to $x-3y=7n$. The matching choice, $x-3y=4n$, is parallel to the original and distinct because $n\gt 0$, so $4n\ne7n$. D is correct.
